task_completion.description: The five reference tiddlers have been created in TiddlyWiki.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the titles of the five references ('Global warming...', 'Biodiversity loss...', etc.) in the 'Recent' tab of the right sidebar, or as open tiddlers in the main view.

task_completion.description: A tiddler titled 'Bibliography' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler with the exact title 'Bibliography' open in the main story river.
Look for a tag pill labeled 'Navigation' at the top of the 'Bibliography' tiddler.

task_completion.description: The 'Bibliography' tiddler displays a list of the five reference tiddlers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the rendered content of the 'Bibliography' tiddler to ensure all five reference titles are displayed in a list.

task_completion.description: The list in the 'Bibliography' tiddler displays the title as a link, followed by the author and year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the entries in the 'Bibliography' tiddler. The title should be a clickable link (typically blue or underlined), and the text immediately following it should contain the author names and the year.

task_completion.description: The list in the 'Bibliography' tiddler is sorted chronologically by the 'year' field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify the order of the items in the 'Bibliography' tiddler. They must be ordered: 2012 (Biodiversity loss...), 2013 (Climate change...), 2015 (Planetary boundaries...), 2018 (Global warming...), 2019 (The global tree...).

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the TiddlyWiki interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the address bar pointing to localhost:8080, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The Bibliography list is generated dynamically using a list widget, not hardcoded text.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the 'Bibliography' tiddler is shown in edit mode, it must contain TiddlyWiki widget syntax (e.g., `<$list filter=...`) rather than manually typed bullet points of the references.

integrity.description: The reference tiddlers use custom fields for author, year, journal, and doi.
integrity.visual_evidence: If any reference tiddler is shown in edit mode, the data (author, year, etc.) should be entered in the 'Add a new field' section at the bottom, not just typed into the main text body.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Expected references to be created:
1. 'Global warming of 1.5°C' (Author: Masson-Delmotte V, Zhai P, Pörtner HO, et al.; Year: 2018; Tag: Climate)
2. 'Biodiversity loss and its impact on humanity' (Author: Cardinale BJ, Duffy JE, Gonzalez A, et al.; Year: 2012; Tag: Biodiversity)
3. 'Planetary boundaries: Guiding human development on a changing planet' (Author: Steffen W, Richardson K, Rockström J, et al.; Year: 2015; Tag: Sustainability)
4. 'The global tree restoration potential' (Author: Bastin JF, Finegold Y, Garcia C, et al.; Year: 2019; Tag: Restoration)
5. 'Climate change and food security' (Author: Wheeler T, von Braun J; Year: 2013; Tag: Climate)
The 'Bibliography' tiddler must display these references sorted by year: 2012, 2013, 2015, 2018, 2019.
